title: Non-inlining interface without tracing reference error

features.name: interface with signal member declaration
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with a logic signal member

features.name: module interface signal assignment and reading
features.description: Code should include a module that assigns to and reads from an interface signal member

features.name: trace optimization interaction at O0
features.description: Code should include interface usage with tracing and -O0 optimization level that triggers internal reference error
